name: Simple Website Blocker: Open Source & Ad-Free
description: This extension blocks website based on a list accessible in Options. It is ad-free & completely source & the code is available at https://github.com/ni6hant/website-blocker-browser-extension . This extension is very very simple. The only reason I made with the help of AI is that I couldn't trust any closed source extensions after my accounts were hacked and all synced passwords stolen due to the BrowsecVPN browser extension.
